Spells.Spell Modification:
Spell Modification

Mana Strain

Take 1 Exhaustion to reduce MP cost by one tier (Tier I = 0 MP). Repeatable up to Exhaustion max.

Rushed Spells (Beam, Explosion, Curing, Restoration)

Cast as Bonus Action. Damage/healing reduced by ½ (min 1).

Overcharging (Beam, Explosion, Curing, Restoration)

Gain 2 Exhaustion for bonus dice:
  • Beam: +Rep Level d8s
  • Explosion: +½ Rep Level d10s (not affected by Intensity)
  • Curing: +Rep Level d6s
  • Restoration: +Rep Level d4s

Total Focus

Required for some spells. Only one effect at a time. Lost when: Berserk, Depleted, Drained, Exposed, Horrified, Silenced, Soul-Siphoned, Soul-Tainted, Unconscious, or combat ends.

Quickening (Barrier, Summoning)

Increase MP cost by 1 Tier to change Action type. No Spell Intensity Tax.

---

Divination Spell Path.name: Divination Spell Path
Divination Spell Path.content:
Divination Spell Path

Requires 2 Spell Path choices. Requires Collector's Spell Deck implement.

Divine the Future

  • Action: Bonus Action
  • Cost: Second highest Spell Tier MP (min I, max IV)
  • Draw 3 Divination Cards + 1 Court Card
  • Slot 1: Upright, Slot 2: Reversed, Slot 3: Upright
  • Court Card: Reigning Card above Slot 2

    • Scaling Value by Tier

    TierMPTaxScaling (+X)
    I302
    II604
    III1506
    IV2508
    V36110
    VI45212

    Court Cards (6 cards, 3 eras)

    CardEraEffectRuling Power
    KingRoyalty+MAM to Leadership ChecksArduous Judgment: +3 MAM
    QueenRoyalty+MAM to one ally's LeadershipCollective Cycle: +3 MAM
    KnightHeroesReduce Physical Damage by MAMEndless Battle: +3 MAM
    DameHeroesReduce Magical Damage by MAMEternal Phase: +3 MAM
    SquireProdigies+MAM to STR/DEX/CON ChecksChiaroscuro: +3 MAM
    DamselProdigies+MAM to INT/WIS/CHA ChecksLove Card protection

    Triumvirates (16 Divination Cards)

    The Chiaroscuro (7-9): Light, Dark, Twilight

  • Complete: All within 60ft heal and gain 5×Rep Temp HP, teleport 30ft, restore 1 slot

    • The Collective Cycle (10-12): Life, Death, Passage

  • Complete: One heals 5×Rep + 0 Stress; one target takes 8×Rep Magical; restore 1 slot

    • The Endless Battle (13-15): Angel, Demon, Mortal

  • Complete: One Outsider takes 5×Rep True; one target takes 5×Rep Magical (×2 Cultist); restore 2 slots

    • The Eternal Phase (16-18): Hope, Despair, Fortune

  • Complete: Repair 1+Rep Fractures among allies; one Cultist skips turn; all MKs gain Advantage once; restore 1 slot

    • The Arduous Judgment (19-21): Justice, Mercy, Reflection

  • Complete: One target takes 8×Rep Magical; all Arguments = Bonus Action; all restore 3×Rep MP; restore 1 slot

    • The Captivating Tale (22): Love

  • Volatile card with Fate Die outcomes (see Release Magic table for details)

Divination Card Effects (Table 7-14)

Individual Upright/Reversed effects for the 16 Divination Cards (+X = Scaling Value):

#CardUpright Effect (activate)Reversed Effect (on reveal)
7LightAll Magi-Knights within 60ft gain +Xd4 Temp HPAll your Weapons/Spells with Range effects only extend 15ft; cannot affect targets beyond
8DarkRestore +X HP, teleport +X (10 feet), cannot be targeted by hostile spells/abilities until start of your next turnLine of sight limited to 15ft; cannot target beyond
9TwilightAuto-activates: Restore one used Divination Slot. If all available, search deck for one card and replace a Divination Card (same position; not Love), then shuffleThis card + one other of your choice are moved aside and replaced with two Reversed cards from the deck; shuffle the moved cards back in
10LifeOne Magi-Knight within 120ft heals +Xd8 HP and reduces Stress by 1While Reversed: any healing you receive is reduced to 0 (except Shards of Power)
11DeathOne target or Horde takes +Xd12 Magical DamageWhile Reversed: at start of your turn take 1 Crystalline Fracture (max 5)
12PassageAuto-activates: Turn one Reversed Divination Card UprightImmediately Reverse one other Upright Divination Card
13AngelOne Outsider takes +Xd12 True DamageWhile Reversed: a Cultist of the Keeper's choice gains Resistance to Physical and Magical Damage
14DemonSpell Attack vs one target: +Xd10 Magical Damage (double vs Cultist)A Vassal/Adversary Outsider of the Keeper's choice immediately takes a turn out of order (if none present, Keeper summons a matching Outsider [Vassal] without this effect)
15MortalAuto-activates: Turn one Reversed Divination Card Upright. Free Action: replace this card with top of deck if you suffered Mortal's Reversed effect in a previous roundAt end of your turn, revert to Student Persona. At end of your next turn, turn this card Upright
16HopeRepair +X (½) Crystalline Fractures of target and remove 2 Stress Points from themGain 3 Stress Points; cannot reduce Stress while Reversed
17DespairOne Cultist target receives -X to all Attacks, Rolls to Resist, and Damage for one turnGain 1 Trauma Point (removed if turned Upright; kept if battle ends Reversed)
18FortuneNext +X (½) d20 rolls receive your MAM as Bonus ModifierWhile Reversed: your MAM becomes a negative modifier
19JusticeSpell Attack vs one target: +Xd12 Magical DamageWhile Reversed: no longer add MAM to Magical Damage or Healing
20MercyAuto-activates: Next Convincing Argument is a Bonus Action; before making it, you are told one of the target's Argument ResistancesWhile Reversed: refuse to help/protect Mortals; reduce one enemy's Heart Stage by 1 (if unable, replace with a different Reversed card)
21ReflectionOne Magi-Knight gains +Xd4 MP up to maximumWhile Reversed: cannot gain HP, MP, or Temp HP from any source
22LoveAuto-activates: Search deck for any card, replace this card with it Upright. Remove Love from play until end of Encounter; shuffle deckCurrent Court Card and Divination Cards all moved aside. Draw a new Court Card and Divination set (same facing). Remove Love from play until end of Encounter, shuffle both decks, gain 1 Trauma Point

A Sovereign's Fate

Bonus Action: discard the top card of your Court Deck. If it is from the same Era as your current Ruling Card, shuffle it back into the Court Deck and you may Turn one Reversed card Upright. If not, replace the Ruling Card with the newly drawn one and shuffle the previous Ruling Card into your deck with no further effects.

Divine Seer (Social)

Once per Episode, a Diviner may Consult the Cards as a Free Time Activity (alone; no Social Points awarded). The Seer gains an Inspiration Point and reduces Stress and Exhaustion by 2 each. The Magic Keeper delivers a hint, missed clue, or answers a single question (vaguely).

---

Spells.Release Magic Style:
Release Magic Style

Release is a unique Magic Style that uses a Spell Deck instead of traditional Spell Paths. Selecting Release entirely replaces your ability to choose other Spell Paths.

Core Rules

  • Collector's Spell Deck: Required Magical Implement to cast Release spells
  • Drawing Spell Cards: At Combat start, draw cards = 3 + Reputation Level (min 1). This is also your Hand Limit
  • Release Power: Standard Action to play a Spell Card. Discard face-up after use
  • Scaling Value: All cards have Scaling Value +X (see table). Stress Points penalize Scaling when Endurance Die fails
  • Fate Die: Some cards require 1d20 roll. No abilities/modifiers affect Fate Die results
  • Draw a Card: At turn end, draw 1 card. Bonus Action: Draw additional card if below Hand Limit

    • Special Abilities

  • Signature Card (Levels 5, 10): Instead of Swift Attack, choose one card from deck. Begin every encounter with it in hand. Cannot choose Love Card
  • Discharge Energy: Bonus Action, discard top card for 30ft Weapon Attack (1d20 + DEX + Proficiency). Deals 1d6 + MAM Magical. At Level 5: +1d8. At Level 10: double MAM
  • Explosive Trinity: Full-Round, discard 3 matching Triumvirate or 3 Court Cards. Make 3 Magic Attacks (1d20 + MAM + Proficiency), 30ft, 3d6 + MAM each. Damage increases: 3d8 (5th), 3d10 (10th), 3d12 (15th)
  • Cycling the Spell Deck: When deck empty, gain 2 Stress to shuffle discard pile into new deck

Summoning Spell Path.name: Summoning Spell Path
Summoning Spell Path.tier_I_special: Summon appears. Surge: Also gain Secondary. Reinforce: If summon present, gain 3×Level+MAM Temp HP
Summoning Spell Path.tier_II_special: +20 Range OR +1d8 melee damage. Quicken available
Summoning Spell Path.tier_III_special: Enlargement (Large, +1d12) OR Duplication (Horde, +3 Atk/Dmg). Surge: Free Summon Elemental
Summoning Spell Path.tier_IV_special: Reaction: Summon takes Fracture damage for you, dispersed
Summoning Spell Path.tier_V_special: Evolution (Huge, 3 Commands, +2d12) OR Mass Duplication (2 Hordes, 3 Commands)
Summoning Spell Path.content:
Summoning Spell Path

Summon Rules

  • Appear within 20ft when summoned
  • Armor: 15
  • Attack: Use your Spell Attack Roll
  • Resistances: +½ MAM (rounded down)
  • Proficiencies: Athletics, Coordination, Perception, Stealth
  • Requires Total Focus to remain Active
  • Range of Influence: 120ft (Passive beyond, removed after 2 turns)
  • Soul-Link: 1 HP, shares HP with summoner

Commands (Bonus Action)

CommandEffect
Move HereMove 20ft
Follow MeStay adjacent, move 20ft/turn until different command
Attack TargetAttack Action within range
Charge In!Move 30ft + attack +2, Armor 13 until next turn

Elemental Summons

ElementDamageSpecial
Earth1d6+MAMEntangling: Enemies leaving Reach have ½ Move
Fire1d6+MAMReflecting: Once/turn, MAM damage to attackers within 10ft
Air1d6+MAMElusive: Never Provokes when Moving
Water1d4+MAMRevitalize: Bonus Command grants MAM Temp HP
Void1d8+MAMMana-Dense: Magic Resistance

Summoning Spells

TierSpellEffect
ISummon ElementalSummon appears. Surge: Also gain Secondary. Reinforce: If summon present, gain 3×Level+MAM Temp HP
IIStrengthen+20 Range OR +1d8 melee damage. Quicken available
IIIEnhancedEnlargement (Large, +1d12) OR Duplication (Horde, +3 Atk/Dmg). Surge: Free Summon Elemental
IVEmpower+10ft Move, double damage dice. Quicken available
IVIntercept AttackReaction: Summon takes Fracture damage for you, dispersed
VTrue SummoningEvolution (Huge, 3 Commands, +2d12) OR Mass Duplication (2 Hordes, 3 Commands)
---

Enhanced Summoning (Companion Path).name: Enhanced Summoning (Companion Path)
Enhanced Summoning (Companion Path).tier_I_special: Companion appears. Surge: Also Embolden. Embolden: 4×Level+MAM Temp HP
Enhanced Summoning (Companion Path).tier_II_special: Companion departs with attack, you gain ½ MP + ½ HP. Cannot Call until next Sleep
Enhanced Summoning (Companion Path).tier_III_special: Full-Round: Teleport to each other, Advantage attack +2d6. Quicken available
Enhanced Summoning (Companion Path).tier_IV_special: Reaction: Negate Fracture damage, Companion attacks with Advantage, teleports 30ft
Enhanced Summoning (Companion Path).tier_V_special: Companion auto-Oversees Battle. After Call for Assistance: +Rep to both attacks
Enhanced Summoning (Companion Path).tier_VI_special: Take another turn. Perfectly Synchronized auto-hits +5 damage each
Enhanced Summoning (Companion Path).content:
Enhanced Summoning (Companion Path)

Select Summoning twice. Replaces standard Summoning.

Companion Rules

  • No Total Focus required
  • Shares HP with True Soul-Link (+Rep Level max HP)
  • Dormant when not transformed
  • Duplicate Armaments: Copy of your Soul Weapon, attacks as Magical
  • Perfectly Synchronized: Your Move = Companion Move; Your Attack = Companion Attack. Same target = +1 both attacks

Companion Spells

TierSpellEffect
ICall ForthCompanion appears. Surge: Also Embolden. Embolden: 4×Level+MAM Temp HP
IIWithdrawCompanion departs with attack, you gain ½ MP + ½ HP. Cannot Call until next Sleep
IIIFlawless CoordinationFull-Round: Teleport to each other, Advantage attack +2d6. Quicken available
IVDeflect and CounterReaction: Negate Fracture damage, Companion attacks with Advantage, teleports 30ft
VExploit OpeningCompanion auto-Oversees Battle. After Call for Assistance: +Rep to both attacks
VIUltimate DuoTake another turn. Perfectly Synchronized auto-hits +5 damage each
---

Chronomancy Spell Path.name: Chronomancy Spell Path
Chronomancy Spell Path.tier_I_description: When attacked within 15ft: Attack enemy before their attack completes
Chronomancy Spell Path.tier_I_name: - Specialist: Target takes your Level as additional damage
Chronomancy Spell Path.tier_II_description: Total Focus: -MAM to damage received; +MAM to damage dealt (becomes Magical)
Chronomancy Spell Path.tier_II_name: - Specialist: Attacks against you reduce damage taken by 1 + MAM; increase your damage by 1 + MAM
Chronomancy Spell Path.tier_III_description: After dealing damage: Reduce to 0. Enemy Roll to Resist (Magic): Fail = ×2 later, Success = ½
Chronomancy Spell Path.tier_III_name: - Specialist: Instead of normal effect, when you would receive any damage, reduce it to 0; at end of your next turn, take the delayed damage
Chronomancy Spell Path.tier_IV_description: You or ally within 10ft about to take damage/Condition: Teleport 10ft together, negate all. Gain Drained
Chronomancy Spell Path.tier_IV_name: - Specialist: Select an ally within 15ft; teleport range 15ft. **Empower:** Cast one Mana Tier higher to gain an additional Bonus Action next turn
Chronomancy Spell Path.tier_V_description: Soul Weapon: 2 Attacks. Implement: Free spell, -10 MP (Tier IV-). Soul Gun: +2 MD, auto-reload. 1d100: 90+ = Temporal Huntress
Chronomancy Spell Path.tier_V_name: - Specialist: Soul Weapon = Advantage on the Weapon Attacks; Implement = reduce MP cost by 15; Soul Gun = +1 Mag Dump value, auto-reload after Mag Dump
Chronomancy Spell Path.tier_VI_description: Total Focus: -3 all damage, Reaction -10 more, +10ft Move (teleport), +1 Bonus, grab ally to teleport. No other Actions during your turn. 1d100: 80+ = Temporal Huntress
Chronomancy Spell Path.tier_VI_name: - Specialist: Reduce damage taken by 6 (Reaction: additional 15); Move +15ft; teleport ally as Free Action
Chronomancy Spell Path.content:
Chronomancy Spell Path

Requires dedication (multiple Spell Path slots). Introduces Temporal effects.

Chronomancy Ranks

DedicationRankAbilities
1NeophyteTemporal Initiative (+MAM to Initiative), Dynamic Telekinesis
2SpecialistSpecialist effects, Be Kind Rewind (reroll/force reroll 1/Sleep)
3MasterMaster effects, Echoing Alacrity (+1 Chrono Reaction), Temporal Evacuation
4GrandmasterGrandmaster effects, Shifting Variable (+1 Armor, +10ft Move), Time Traveler

Chronomancy Spells

TierSpellActionEffect
IVelocity BurstReactionWhen attacked within 15ft: Attack enemy before their attack completes
IITime ScreenStandardTotal Focus: -MAM to damage received; +MAM to damage dealt (becomes Magical)
IIIMoratoriumImmediateAfter dealing damage: Reduce to 0. Enemy Roll to Resist (Magic): Fail = ×2 later, Success = ½
IVTimely InterventionReactionYou or ally within 10ft about to take damage/Condition: Teleport 10ft together, negate all. Gain Drained
VTime Displaced WeaponBonusSoul Weapon: 2 Attacks. Implement: Free spell, -10 MP (Tier IV-). Soul Gun: +2 MD, auto-reload. 1d100: 90+ = Temporal Huntress
VIChrono DanceImmediateTotal Focus: -3 all damage, Reaction -10 more, +10ft Move (teleport), +1 Bonus, grab ally to teleport. No other Actions during your turn. 1d100: 80+ = Temporal Huntress

Temporal Effects and Spell Intensity

Chronomancy spells use Temporal effects with reduced/varied casting times instead of Standard Actions. Tier V and VI Chronomancy spells do NOT pay the Spell Intensity Tax; Temporal effects impose alternative penalties instead (e.g., Temporal Huntress rolls).

Chronomancy Spell Mastery Increases (Tables 7-21, 7-22)

Extra Effects gained by Rank for each spell (Neophyte gains none):

Tier I — Velocity Burst:

  • Specialist: Target takes your Level as additional damage
  • Master: Target takes your Level as additional damage
  • Grandmaster: Target takes your Level + Reputation Level as additional damage

    • Tier II — Time Screen:

  • Specialist: Attacks against you reduce damage taken by 1 + MAM; increase your damage by 1 + MAM
  • Master: Reduce damage taken by 2 + MAM; increase damage dealt by 2 + MAM. Empower: Cast one Spell Tier higher for an additional 3 damage reduction and +3 damage when attacking through the Screen
  • Grandmaster: Reduce damage taken by 4 + MAM; increase damage by 4 + MAM. Empower+: Cast one Spell Tier higher for an additional 6 reduction/+6 damage

    • Tier III — Moratorium (Empower — cast one Spell Tier higher):

  • Specialist: Instead of normal effect, when you would receive any damage, reduce it to 0; at end of your next turn, take the delayed damage
  • Master: As Specialist, but at end of your next turn make a Roll to Resist (Magic); on success take only ½ the damage
  • Grandmaster: As Master, but the Roll to Resist (Magic) is made with Advantage

    • Tier IV — Timely Intervention:

  • Specialist: Select an ally within 15ft; teleport range 15ft. Empower: Cast one Mana Tier higher to gain an additional Bonus Action next turn
  • Master: Ally within 20ft; teleport 20ft. Empower: As Specialist. Empower (Cleanse): Cast one Spell Tier higher to gain Cleanse (1) at end of your turn
  • Grandmaster: Ally within 30ft; teleport 30ft. Empower+: Cast two Mana Tiers higher for an additional Standard Action next turn; or one Spell Tier higher for Cleanse (1) for both you and the ally

    • Tier V — Time Displaced Weapon:

  • Specialist: Soul Weapon = Advantage on the Weapon Attacks; Implement = reduce MP cost by 15; Soul Gun = +1 Mag Dump value, auto-reload after Mag Dump
  • Master: Same as Specialist + Empower: Cast one Spell Tier higher to cast as a Free Action
  • Grandmaster: Soul Weapon = 3 Weapon Attacks with Advantage; Implement = reduce MP cost to 0; Soul Gun = +2 Mag Dump value, auto-reload. Empower+: Cast one Spell Tier higher to cast as an Immediate Action

    • Tier VI — Chrono Dance:

  • Specialist: Reduce damage taken by 6 (Reaction: additional 15); Move +15ft; teleport ally as Free Action
  • Master: Reduce damage by 9 (Reaction: additional 20); Move +20ft; additional Standard Action instead of Bonus Action; teleport ally as Free Action
  • Grandmaster: Reduce damage by 12 (Reaction: additional 25); Move +25ft; additional Standard AND Bonus Action; teleport ally as Free Action

Temporal Evacuation (Once per Character)

When Soul Crystal would be destroyed, roll d20:

RollResult
20The Returner: Shard of the Magi-Knight, return next turn within 20ft, immune to Horrified/Distressed
11-19Fashionably Late: Shard of Nepenthe, skip 1d2 turns, return within 20ft
6-10The Delayed: Skip 1d4 turns, return with 7 Fractures + ½ HP
2-5Ravaged by Time: Return at combat end with 7 Fractures, 1 HP, 6 Stress, 6 Exhaustion, +2 Trauma, Unconscious
1Lost in Time: Character lost forever. Squadron: Roll to Resist (Purity; 2 Trauma; DC 16)
---

Spells.Deathwatch:
Deathwatch

Spells with Deathwatch can be cast as Bonus Action or Reaction when adjacent ally reaches 0 HP. Does not prevent initial Crystalline Fracture.

---
Spells.Temporal Huntress:
Temporal Huntress

When a Chronomancer casts Tier V or VI Chronomancy spells, they risk summoning a Temporal Huntress—a time-traveling assassin sent by the Invading Evil to hunt Chronomancers.

Summoning Trigger

SpellRollTrigger
Time Displaced Weapon (Tier V)1d10090+ summons Temporal Huntress
Chrono Dance (Tier VI)1d10080+ summons Temporal Huntress

Temporal Huntress Template

When summoned, the Magic Keeper places a Spectral Outsider matching the squadron's Invasion Level (Adversary Rank). The recommended first Temporal Huntress is a Shrieking Canticula. The chosen Outsider gains this template:

Template Additions:

  • Gains Clearsight
  • Roll Initiative with Advantage. Appears during its turn and makes an immediate Ambush Attack against the Chronomancer
  • Chronomancy Resistance: Damage from Chronomancy spells reduced by ½
  • Advantage on Rolls to Resist vs Chronomancy effects
  • Damage dealt by Temporal Huntress cannot be mitigated by Chronomancy magic
  • When Chronomancy teleportation is used, may immediately Teleport 15ft
  • All Move Actions count as Teleportation
  • Gains Predator (Chronomancers) and Cruel and Hateful (Chronomancers) traits

    • Behavior:

  • If all nearby Chronomancers are slain: Full-Round Action to teleport 300ft and leave Encounter
  • If slain: Add 1d8 to Inert Spectral Energy total. No new Temporal Huntress for rest of Episode

    • Limits:

  • Only one Temporal Huntress pursues each Chronomancer per Episode
  • Magic Keeper may introduce one at any point after a Tier V+ Chronomancy spell has been cast
Spells.General Spellcasting Rules:
General Spellcasting Rules

  • Spell Attack = Proficiency Bonus + MAM
  • Spell DC = 8 + Proficiency Bonus + MAM
  • Spells may only be cast during a Combat Encounter; spell effects end at the end of the final combat round
  • You have access to all spells within a known Spell Path equal to or below your Max Spell Tier
  • Add your MAM to spell damage and healing totals
  • Any damage dealt through a spell (or in combination with one) becomes Magical Damage
  • Area of Effect spells do not harm allies
  • Casting requires moving and speaking freely — you cannot cast while Restrained, Silenced, Exposed, or Unconscious
  • Unless stated otherwise, casting a spell requires a Standard Action
  • A chosen Spell Path may only be switched after you gain a new Reputation Level
  • If you cannot pay the Spell Intensity Tax (Tiers V-VI), you cannot cast the spell
  • Magic cannot be used outside your Magi-Knight Persona; all magical effects end when you are no longer transformed

    • Healing Yourself

  • When healing yourself with your own spell, do not add modifiers — use only the dice total
  • When casting a Restoration Spell, you do not contribute your modifier to Temp HP or Healing you would receive
  • This includes modifiers from your own Auras; an Aura granted by another Magi-Knight does add its modifier

    • Spell Attacks and Explosions

  • Spell Attacks target Armor like weapon attacks (Beams can miss)
  • Explosions: always roll against On-Target: 16 (as if 16 Armor). On-Target = full damage; Off-Target = ½ damage (rounded down). A Natural 1 is a Total Miss. Some enemy abilities can alter the On-Target number
  • A Rushed Explosion that is Off-Target reduces damage by ½ and then an additional ½
  • Explosions deal damage to each Part of an enemy Horde (a Swarm counts as a Horde)

Curing Path.name: Curing Path
Curing Path.content:
Curing Path

Type: Single-target healing Range: 5ft (Touch) Action: Standard

TierHealingSpecialEffect
I1d10 + 1d4DeathwatchStabilize dying ally
II1d10 + 2d6Cleanse (1), DeathwatchRemove one Condition
III1d10 + 3d8Mending (1), DeathwatchRepair 1 Crystalline Fracture
IV5d10Deathwatch, Purge (1)Entirely remove one Condition
V6d12Deathwatch, Instant, Mending (2)Free Action; Repair 2 Fractures
VI200 HPDeathwatch, Mending (4), Purge (2)Repair 4 Fractures; Remove 2 Conditions

Curing Keywords

  • Deathwatch: Can stabilize a dying ally
  • Cleanse (X): Remove X Conditions from target
  • Purge (X): Entirely remove X Conditions (stronger than Cleanse)
  • Mending (X): Repair X Crystalline Fractures
  • Instant: Cast as Free Action
---

Restoration Path.name: Restoration Path
Restoration Path.tier_I_description: Provides Temp HP to squadron only
Restoration Path.tier_VI_description: Heals, grants 5×MAM Temp HP, repairs 1 Fracture
Restoration Path.content:
Restoration Path

Type: Squad healing/protection Range: 60ft (affects squadron) Action: Standard

TierEffectSpecialDescription
I1d4ProtectionProvides Temp HP to squadron only
II2d4RestorationHeals all squadron Magi-Knights
III3d4Restoration OR ProtectionChoose Temp HP OR healing
IV1d6 + 3d4Instant ProtectionFree Action; Temp HP only
V2d6 + 4d4Restoration OR Protection, Cleanse (1)Choose effect; also Cleanse one
VI4d6 + 8d4Restoration, Protection (×5 MAM), Mending (1)Heals, grants 5×MAM Temp HP, repairs 1 Fracture
---

Amplify Path.name: Amplify Path
Amplify Path.tier_I_special: Add Rep Level (min 1) to Attacks and Rolls to Resist. Stack: +1 more
Amplify Path.tier_I_description: Until next turn: Add MAM to first Attack
Amplify Path.tier_II_special: Healing spells add ½ Level (min 1) + MAM (single) or MAM (multi). Stack: +5/+2 per Rep
Amplify Path.tier_II_description: Until next turn: One ally regains HP = MAM + Rep at start of turn
Amplify Path.tier_III_special: Remove Berserk/Bleeding/Burning/Disoriented from one ally per turn. Stack: Add Drained/Distressed/Silenced; Stack again: Add Soul-Siphoned (I-II)/Soul-Tainted
Amplify Path.tier_III_description: Until next turn: Add MAM to first Roll to Resist
Amplify Path.tier_IV_special: Advantage on Roll to Resist vs Conditions; re-roll active Conditions. Stack: +2 to Roll
Amplify Path.tier_IV_description: Until next turn: Add MAM to first Skill Check
Amplify Path.tier_V_special: Remove 1 Stress or Exhaustion from squadron per turn (combat only). Stack: +2 MP per turn
Amplify Path.tier_V_description: Until next turn: +2×MAM MP at start of ally turns
Amplify Path.tier_VI_special: Gain 1 chosen Aura for squad + 2 more for self only (no Flare/Stack). Stack: Auras persist until all lose Focus or combat ends
Amplify Path.tier_VI_description: Once per Round: Reroll d20 if result ≤ MAM
Amplify Path.content:
Amplify Path

Type: Aura buffs Range: 120ft (affects squadron) Requirement: Total Focus Action: Standard

TierAuraEffectFlare (Bonus Action)
IEnhancementAdd Rep Level (min 1) to Attacks and Rolls to Resist. Stack: +1 moreUntil next turn: Add MAM to first Attack
IIIlluminationHealing spells add ½ Level (min 1) + MAM (single) or MAM (multi). Stack: +5/+2 per RepUntil next turn: One ally regains HP = MAM + Rep at start of turn
IIIPurificationRemove Berserk/Bleeding/Burning/Disoriented from one ally per turn. Stack: Add Drained/Distressed/Silenced; Stack again: Add Soul-Siphoned (I-II)/Soul-TaintedUntil next turn: Add MAM to first Roll to Resist
IVResolutionAdvantage on Roll to Resist vs Conditions; re-roll active Conditions. Stack: +2 to RollUntil next turn: Add MAM to first Skill Check
VSerenityRemove 1 Stress or Exhaustion from squadron per turn (combat only). Stack: +2 MP per turnUntil next turn: +2×MAM MP at start of ally turns
VIVisionary FocusGain 1 chosen Aura for squad + 2 more for self only (no Flare/Stack). Stack: Auras persist until all lose Focus or combat endsOnce per Round: Reroll d20 if result ≤ MAM
---

Manipulate Path.name: Manipulate Path
Manipulate Path.tier_I_description: Roll to Resist (Magic). Fail: Restrained. Fail by 5+: Also Prone (Bonus). Success: Refund ½ MP. Nemesis+ have Advantage
Manipulate Path.tier_II_description: Opposed Mysticism (Nemesis Advantage). Fail: Disoriented. Success: Refund ½ MP
Manipulate Path.tier_III_description: Roll to Resist (Magic). Fail: Roll 2d6 for Condition (1-Berserk, 2-Bleed(2+MAM), 3-Burning(2+MAM), 4-Disoriented, 5-Poisoned, 6-Silenced). Doubles: Condition + 3d12 damage. Nemesis+: 4d12 damage only
Manipulate Path.tier_IV_description: Opposed Mysticism. Fail: Paralyzed. Success: Refund ½ MP (Adversary: +1 Stress). No effect on Nemesis+
Manipulate Path.tier_V_description: Spell Attack. Hit: Bleeding (8) + Level + MAM damage. Miss: Bleeding (8) only. Swarm: 2×Level + MAM damage or ½ MP refund
Manipulate Path.tier_VI_description: While maintaining Total Focus: All Magi-Knight Weapon/Spell Attacks gain Advantage. If already Advantage: Reroll one damage die
Manipulate Path.content:
Manipulate Path

Type: Debuffs and control Range: 60ft Requirement: Total Focus Action: Standard

TierSpell NameTargetEffect
IElemental Chains1 CultistRoll to Resist (Magic). Fail: Restrained. Fail by 5+: Also Prone (Bonus). Success: Refund ½ MP. Nemesis+ have Advantage
IIGlaring Resonance2 Adjacent Cultists or 1 HordeOpposed Mysticism (Nemesis Advantage). Fail: Disoriented. Success: Refund ½ MP
IIIErratic Misfortune1 EnemyRoll to Resist (Magic). Fail: Roll 2d6 for Condition (1-Berserk, 2-Bleed(2+MAM), 3-Burning(2+MAM), 4-Disoriented, 5-Poisoned, 6-Silenced). Doubles: Condition + 3d12 damage. Nemesis+: 4d12 damage only
IVSpectral Restraints1 Outsider/HordeOpposed Mysticism. Fail: Paralyzed. Success: Refund ½ MP (Adversary: +1 Stress). No effect on Nemesis+
VThousand Elemental CutsUp to 4 Targets or 2 HordesSpell Attack. Hit: Bleeding (8) + Level + MAM damage. Miss: Bleeding (8) only. Swarm: 2×Level + MAM damage or ½ MP refund
VIElemental Degradation1 TargetWhile maintaining Total Focus: All Magi-Knight Weapon/Spell Attacks gain Advantage. If already Advantage: Reroll one damage die
---

Barrier Path.name: Barrier Path
Barrier Path.tier_I_description: Reduce Physical damage by Rep Level d4s + MAM. Magical: d8s instead. Overcharge: d4→d8, d8→d12. Quicken: Immediate Action
Barrier Path.tier_II_description: You + willing Magi-Knight gain Physical Resistance, split all damage evenly. One instance only
Barrier Path.tier_III_description: All Magi-Knights in 20ft gain Magical Resistance to one source. Overcharge: Immunity vs Adversary/Vassal. Quicken: Immediate Action
Barrier Path.tier_IV_description: Physical + Magical Immunity to one ability; then Resistance until your turn (gain Drained). Overcharge: No Drained. Quicken: Immediate Action
Barrier Path.tier_V_description: You + one Magi-Knight gain Magical Resistance. If Twin Souls active last round, Total Focus both
Barrier Path.tier_VI_description: All Magi-Knights in 60ft gain Physical + Magical Immunity to one source. Next turn: Depleted. Overcharge: Drained instead
Barrier Path.content:
Barrier Path

Type: Damage reduction/shields Action: Varies (many are Reactions)

TierSpell NameActionEffect
IShield of DissipationReactionReduce Physical damage by Rep Level d4s + MAM. Magical: d8s instead. Overcharge: d4→d8, d8→d12. Quicken: Immediate Action
IITwin Souls (Total Focus)StandardYou + willing Magi-Knight gain Physical Resistance, split all damage evenly. One instance only
IIIGlobe of DissipationReactionAll Magi-Knights in 20ft gain Magical Resistance to one source. Overcharge: Immunity vs Adversary/Vassal. Quicken: Immediate Action
IVBarrier of NullificationReactionPhysical + Magical Immunity to one ability; then Resistance until your turn (gain Drained). Overcharge: No Drained. Quicken: Immediate Action
VStrengthen Element (Total Focus)StandardYou + one Magi-Knight gain Magical Resistance. If Twin Souls active last round, Total Focus both
VIColossal Sphere of NullificationReactionAll Magi-Knights in 60ft gain Physical + Magical Immunity to one source. Next turn: Depleted. Overcharge: Drained instead
---

Transformation Path.name: Transformation Path
Transformation Path.tier_I_description: Weapon Damage = 3d4. Use MAM for Attack/Damage modifiers. Enhance: +2 Stress to deal Magical damage. Linked: If under Transformation, cast as Bonus Action
Transformation Path.tier_II_description: Next Weapon Attack auto-hits + 10 damage. Soul Guns roll for Direct Hit only. Enhance: +1 Stress for +5 damage
Transformation Path.tier_III_description: +30 Temp HP, +1 Move and Bonus Action per Round, +1d10 Weapon Damage per Round. Lasts until Unconscious/combat ends. Total Focus protected vs Depleted/Drained/Soul-Siphoned (II-IV)/Unconscious. Full-Round: Remove Distressed even if already
Transformation Path.tier_IV_description: Make 3 Weapon Attacks. Recover 1 Stress per hit
Transformation Path.tier_V_description: +60 Temp HP, +1 Move and Standard Action per Round, +2d10 Weapon Damage per Round. Total Focus protected vs Depleted/Drained/Soul-Siphoned (III-IV)/Unconscious. Full-Round: Remove Horrified even if already. Does not stack with [Super]
Transformation Path.tier_VI_description: Immediate Action when receiving last Crystalline Fracture: Heal 3 Fractures, recover ½ HP, recover 25 MP, reduce Stress to 0, take a turn after current turn
Transformation Path.content:
Transformation Path

Type: Self-buffs and weapon enhancement Action: Varies

TierSpell NameRequirementEffect
IEmpower ElementTotal FocusWeapon Damage = 3d4. Use MAM for Attack/Damage modifiers. Enhance: +2 Stress to deal Magical damage. Linked: If under Transformation, cast as Bonus Action
IIElemental FocusNoneNext Weapon Attack auto-hits + 10 damage. Soul Guns roll for Direct Hit only. Enhance: +1 Stress for +5 damage
IIITransformation [Super]Total Focus+30 Temp HP, +1 Move and Bonus Action per Round, +1d10 Weapon Damage per Round. Lasts until Unconscious/combat ends. Total Focus protected vs Depleted/Drained/Soul-Siphoned (II-IV)/Unconscious. Full-Round: Remove Distressed even if already
IVUnleash FuryTransformation ActiveMake 3 Weapon Attacks. Recover 1 Stress per hit
VTransformation [Ultimate]Total Focus+60 Temp HP, +1 Move and Standard Action per Round, +2d10 Weapon Damage per Round. Total Focus protected vs Depleted/Drained/Soul-Siphoned (III-IV)/Unconscious. Full-Round: Remove Horrified even if already. Does not stack with [Super]
VISecond AwakeningNoneImmediate Action when receiving last Crystalline Fracture: Heal 3 Fractures, recover ½ HP, recover 25 MP, reduce Stress to 0, take a turn after current turn
